request: Rewrite README.md using auth0/open-source-template's README-sample.md as the structural skeleton, drawing voice from PRODUCT.md and visual/copy register from DESIGN.md. Companion files CODE-OF-CONDUCT.md, LICENSE, SECURITY.md (already present in working tree, untracked) get linked from the README and committed alongside. The chore skill: read all four sources, propose a structure, get user sign-off, apply the rewrite + commit the three companion files.
note: Chore-track documentation rewrite. The chore skill handles internal routing through simplify / integrate / document / archive based on conditional triggers. Likely conditional decisions: simplify YES (large-ish prose diff), integrate YES (audit re-stamp), security NO (no attack surface in prose), document NO (the work IS documentation; no derivative doc to update), archive YES (mandatory). Out-of-scope: deciding whether the README design is final — that's a user judgment call after the structure proposal.
